description: Composite key: {accession}:{source_name}
Source name as provided in OSDR from study.source name
Number of OSD studies containing this subject
Number of unique assays conducted on this subject
Cross-study subject ID (only set when properties are consistent across studies; null for ambiguous names)
Biological sex from study.characteristics.sex
Genetic strain or line from study.characteristics.strain
Genotype description from study.characteristics.genotype
Age at relevant timepoint from study.characteristics.age
Developmental stage from study.characteristics.developmental stage
Cell line identifier if applicable from study.characteristics.cell line
Vendor or source from study.characteristics.animal source
Diet description from study.characteristics.diet
Body mass from study.characteristics.body mass
Individual identifier within study from study.characteristics.individual identifier
Absorbed radiation dose with units from study.parameter value.absorbed radiation dose
Radiation dose rate from study.parameter value.absorbed radiation dose rate
Source of ionizing radiation from study.parameter value.ionizing radiation categorized by source
Light cycle conditions from study.parameter value.light cycle
Housing conditions from study.parameter value.housing condition
Growth temperature from study.parameter value.growth temperature
Habitat or hardware used from study.parameter value.habitat
Method of euthanasia from study.parameter value.euthanasia method
